calculated_fields.name: Calculation_2232659546626289668
calculated_fields.caption: Calculation1
calculated_fields.calculation:
// Calculated Field: Most Profitable Product
{ FIXED [Product_Description] : SUM([Quantity] * [Avg_Price]) }

calculated_fields.name: Calculation_42221277678399500
calculated_fields.caption: Average Tenure
calculated_fields.calculation:
// Calculated Field: Average Tenure (Months)
{ FIXED [Customer_ID] : SUM([Tenure_Months]) }

calculated_fields.name: Calculation_950259549625729025
calculated_fields.caption: Tenure Range
calculated_fields.calculation:
IF [Tenure_Months] <= 12 THEN '0-12 months'
ELSEIF [Tenure_Months] <= 24 THEN '13-24 months'
ELSEIF [Tenure_Months] <= 36 THEN '25-36 months'
ELSE 'Over 36 months'
END
